companyNameJapanese: 北方華創科技集団股份有限公司
description: China's #1 and world's #6 semiconductor equipment company. Only domestic platform-type semi equipment maker covering etching, thin-film deposition (PVD/CVD), thermal processing, cleaning, coating/developing, CMP, ion implantation, and test equipment (test machines, sorters, probe stations). FY2024 revenue ~30B CNY, net profit 5.62B CNY (#1 profit in China semiconductor sector). Competes with ACCRETECH in CMP equipment and probe stations.

majorClients: Major Chinese fabs and memory makers
competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - CMP equipment, probe stations
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap ~352B CNY (~7.4T JPY). Stock price ~486 CNY (Feb 2026). China's semiconductor equipment national champion. 5 product lines: Etching (35% of revenue, ~6B CNY), Thin-film deposition (35%, ~6B CNY), Thermal/cleaning (18%, ~3B CNY), Solar/PV (12%), plus CMP and test equipment. Q1 2025: revenue 8.2B CNY (+37.9% YoY), net profit 1.58B CNY (+38.8%). Directly competes with ACCRETECH in CMP equipment segment (though CMP is small portion of NAURA revenue). Also developing probe stations and test equipment. Strong Buy consensus from 22 analysts.

_metadata.dataSource: Investing.com, SZSE, company website, 21Jingji, industry reports, Chinese language sources
